channel.title: Python on rena mice.
channel.description: Recent content in Python on rena mice.

item.title: Presentation: Python
item.description: I have to present on Python as a part of the course. At least, I managed to put together two basic examples for this presentation. Originally I had planned on three prototypes but the library that I was counting on broke down and I figured it would be better to just cut it off instead of switching libraries and re-writing the entire code base.
